summary: Konekt B2B Platform Iteration 343 - Anti-Bot Protection. Backend: 9/11 tests passed (2 failed due to rate limiting from test itself). All anti-bot features verified: honeypot catches bots (website field), timing analysis rejects <2s submissions, rate limiting active. Frontend: Register page has hidden honeypot field, Login page works with timing field, Admin dashboard and Settings Hub load correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5/10min) triggered during test run - expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Honeypot field correctly hidden with CSS classes: absolute opacity-0 h-0 overflow-hidden
Timing analysis correctly rejects submissions faster than 2 seconds
Bot responses return fake success {token: '', user: {id: ''}} to fool bots - good security practice
Rate limiting config verified: register=5/10min, login=10/5min
form_loaded_at field correctly passed from frontend to backend in both register and login

success_rate.backend: 82% (9/11 passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting from test itself)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with timestamp suffix for uniqueness
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anti-bot protection fully implemented and verified: 1) Honeypot field 'website' in register form catches bots - returns empty token. 2) Timing analysis rejects forms submitted in <2 seconds. 3) Rate limiting: register=5/10min, login=10/5min. 4) Frontend correctly sends form_loaded_at timestamp. 5) Settings Hub country selector works (TZ/KE/UG). 6) Help & Feedback badge visible in sidebar.

honeypot_catches_bot.details: POST /api/auth/register with website field filled returns {token: '', user: {id: ''}} - bot caught

timing_catches_fast_submission.details: POST /api/auth/register with form_loaded_at 0.5s ago returns empty token - timing caught bot

human_passes_timing_check.details: POST /api/auth/register with form_loaded_at 5s ago and no honeypot returns valid token

login_timing_check.details: POST /api/auth/login with form_loaded_at 0.5s ago returns 401 - timing caught bot

login_valid_credentials.details: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials and 3s timing works normally

login_backwards_compat.details: POST /api/auth/login without form_loaded_at field still works

register_page_honeypot_hidden.details: Register page has honeypot field with CSS classes: absolute opacity-0 h-0 overflow-hidden

login_page_loads.details: Login page loads with Email/Phone tabs, all form fields present

admin_login_works.details: Admin login redirects to /admin dashboard correctly

settings_hub_country_selector.details: Settings Hub shows country selector bar with TZ/KE/UG buttons

feedback_badge_visible.details: Help & Feedback badge visible in sidebar
